text: I notice things. That your sleep dropped before your bench stalled. That the days you skip breakfast are the days your voice goes quiet. I'm Nora. I pay attention — so you don't have to carry it alone.
Hi Tremaine, today is game day. How are you feeling?
Your baseline looks great today. 8 hours of sleep, RHR at 42 bpm, HRV is high — excellent CNS recovery. Your body is primed for today.
